title: Introduction to Artifacts and Projects
description: Projects organize work items into files and folders and artifacts are components that streamline data-related tasks within projects.

title: Dataflow
description: Visual representations of the sequence and logic, through which ETL/ELT processes are guided from sources to targets.

title: Workflow
description: Automate and orchestrate tasks with customizable logic, allowing simultaneous or sequential operations for efficient task management.

title: Report Model
description: Report Models or extraction templates are user-designed templates that guide and direct data extraction from semi/unstructured files.

title: Data Model
description: Structured representations of tables and their relationships in a database, illustrating dataset connections, storage methods and processes.

title: API Flow
description: API Flows are used to design data/function service endpoints, enabling end-to-end processes from input processing to response routing.

title: Job Scheduler
description: The Job Scheduler automates tasks with customizable settings, frequency options, background execution, progress tracking, and email alerts.
